name: chr19_19q13_11_CYP4F_SD
description: 19q13.11/12 CYP4F cytochrome-P450 cluster — a tandem array of CYP4F2/3/8/11/12/22 paralogs at 80-95% identity, flanked by small SDs. The cluster harbours the leukotriene B4 and arachidonic acid omega-hydroxylases; CYP4F2*3 is a clinically important warfarin-dose modifier.

architecture.internal_structure: ~6-7 CYP4F paralog genes (12-15 exons each) in tandem at 80-95% identity over ~400 kb, with short flanking SDs <20 kb; common SNV/indel paralog-specific markers.
